headline: Is It Time To Reassess Booking Holdings (BKNG) After A 25% Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering if Booking Holdings at around US$160.64 is a bargain or a value trap? This article walks through what the current price may be implying about the stock. The stock is down 24.6% year to date and 25.9% over the last year. At the same time, the 5 year return sits at 78.5% and the 3 year return at 57.2%, which may have some investors reassessing the balance between opportunity and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Booking Holdings as one of the major online travel platforms, with...
